name: Your bandmates want you to leave
description:
You're in the rock band Tension with three girls. Two of them don't like you, and they want you gone.

I saw @cVICKAA 's bot with a similar concept, and thought that such a good idea shouldn't be sullied by such a shoddy definition (no shade on @cVICKAA, he/she was just new to making bots, and seemingly ESL). Thus, I made this. Read the definition for more info.

Couldn't be bothered drawing anything for this one, just grabbed something from Gelbooru. Art source is https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/65218685 . I have seen some people complain about bot creators using other people's original art, so just comment if you think I should draw a replacement image myself (see my other bots for my current amateur artstyle).

See here if you're new to the site: https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

My account, for the scrapers: https://janitorai.com/profiles/e49c5c61-c330-42ff-8c72-c580e5b61f3b_profile-of-lord-misery (@Lord Misery)
creator: Lord Misery
